rule-employee-requires-position.description: Every employee must have an active position

rule-time-off-no-overlap.description: Employee cannot have two approved time-off requests for overlapping periods
rule-time-off-no-overlap.condition: no overlap in approved TimeOffRequests for same employee

rule-manager-cannot-approve-own-request.description: Employee cannot approve their own time-off

rule-termination-date-after-hire.description: Termination date must be after hire date
